# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

es_snapshot_configs:
  repositories:
    - name: s3-repo # Repository Name, it could be any string up to your preference but needs unique id across all clusters (must match in other configurations)
      type: s3
      base_pathname: mybucket/esbackup               
      
# Restore Snapshot example 1 - snapshotName = "snap-02" and repository name='s3-repo', it will restore the given snapshots to Elasticsearch cluster. You may need replace 'mycluster'/'mystandard'-values as per your requirements such, you can use `elastic/`+your_esversion
      filters: {}  # Filtering based on which files should be saved - uncomment and set up the needed data according to specific file or index. (You might have only one filter in a scenario) if it is not mentioned then no filtering takes place i.e., all documents will get snapshotted;
      snapshot_repository: s3-repo  # name of repository defined above used for backup - match with that specified while defining the repositories block
